title: AuthGuard - unauthenticated user on /register
description: Verify unauthenticated user can access /register (no redirect)
expected_result: Page loads with registration form, no redirect

title: AuthGuard - unauthenticated user on /login
description: Verify unauthenticated user can access /login (no redirect)
expected_result: Page loads with login form, no redirect

title: Email validation - invalid format

title: Slug validation - reserved slug
description: Test slug validation with reserved slug
expected_result: Error message shown for reserved slug

title: Checkout requires authentication
expected_result: User redirected to login or stayed but cannot access checkout

description: Test onboarding form with valid slug
